objective: Dispatch bounded Codex workers through native and custom-provider routes with receipts
prefetch: Read the slice plan and listed source files before broader search
constraints: Windows external dispatch is dispatch-proven through Job Object containment
Linux/macOS external dispatch is unavailable-before-start; discovery, preview, and current fallback remain portable
Route attestation is dispatcher-owned and stored in private user-local state
Telemetry verifies but cannot mint capability credit
acceptance_criteria: Windows external dispatch is dispatch-proven through Job Object containment
Linux/macOS external dispatch remains unavailable-before-start while discovery, preview, and current fallback stay portable
Dispatcher-owned route attestation is stored only in private user-local state
Telemetry verifies evidence but cannot mint capability credit
Ordinary proof remains authoritative even when provenance is unknown
model_tier_reason: External process execution, credentials, sandbox authority, fallback, and provenance are high risk
escalation_triggers: Provider evidence cannot be separated from work proof
Fallback would cross a less-trusted boundary without approval
